mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_note_change_diff (note_id, status, diff_json, old_file_size, new_file_size, diff_file_size) VALUES (#{noteId}, #{status}, #{diffJson}, #{oldFileSize}, #{newFileSize}, #{diffFileSize}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), diff_json = VALUES(diff_json), old_file_size = VALUES(old_file_size), new_file_size = VALUES(new_file_size), diff_file_size = VALUES(diff_file_size), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_note_change_diff SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM biz_note_change_diff WHERE note_id IN
#{noteId}
